app.name: ChildBloom
app.disclaimer: Dr. Bloom offers guidance, not a diagnosis. Your paediatrician knows your child best.

auth.confirmationSent: We've sent a confirmation link. Click it and you're in.

onboarding.setupSteps: Let's set things up — takes 2 minutes
onboarding.personalise: We'll use this to make things feel personal
onboarding.tellUsAbout: Tell us about your little one
onboarding.selectSituation: What best describes you right now?
onboarding.readyToTrack: ChildBloom is ready to grow with {{name}}.
onboarding.guidePregnancy: We'll walk with you, week by week.

dashboard.addChildStart: Add your little one in Settings to get started.

askAi.title: Ask Dr. Bloom
askAi.subtitle: Dr. Bloom knows {{name}}. Ask anything.
askAi.askAnything: Milestones, food, sleep, vaccines — nothing is too small to ask.
askAi.suggestedQ1: What should {{name}} be doing this month?
askAi.suggestedQ2: {{name}} isn't eating well. What should I do?
askAi.suggestedQ3: Best Indian foods for brain development?
askAi.suggestedQ4: How much sleep does {{name}} need right now?
askAi.suggestedQ6: Which vaccines are coming up for {{name}}?
askAi.errorMessage: Something went wrong on my end. Try asking again.

growth.title: {{name}}'s Growth
growth.addFirst: The first measurement is always special. Let's start tracking.
growth.head: Head

food.title: What {{name}} eats
food.startTracking: Even a small snack counts. What did {{name}} eat?
food.startTrackingGeneric: Start noting meals, feeds, and new foods.
food.foodPlaceholder: e.g. Dal khichdi, ragi porridge, mashed banana
food.notesPlaceholder: e.g. Loved it, wasn't interested at first
food.reactionPlaceholder: e.g. Rash, loose stools — or nothing at all

health.title: {{name}}'s Health
health.keepTrack: No records yet — that might mean everything's been smooth. When something happens, we'll keep it here.
health.recordType: What type of record is this?
health.notesPlaceholder: How did it go? Any reactions or instructions?

guides.title: What to expect
guides.subtitle: Here's what matters at this stage
guides.whoDisclaimer: Based on WHO and IAP guidelines. Every child grows at their own pace — your paediatrician knows your child best.

settings.title: Your Space
settings.subtitle: Everything here is just for you.
settings.name: Your Name
settings.description: A child development companion made for Indian parents.
settings.aboutDisclaimer: Guidance is based on WHO and IAP guidelines. Always loop in your paediatrician for anything that worries you.
settings.removeConfirm: Remove {{name}}? This will also delete all their records.

common.disclaimerText: Dr. Bloom gives guidance like a paediatrician would. For anything serious, always see a doctor in person.
